classes.reasoning: Document is a Serious Adverse Event (SAE) Report with reference BIORCE-SAE-2023-008, including clinical narrative, causality assessment, and regulatory actions. This is a regulated Trial Master File document tracking a SUSAR (Suspected Unexpected Serious Adverse Reaction) in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001.

summary: This is a final (3rd) Serious Adverse Event report documenting a Grade 3 drug-induced pneumonitis (SUSAR) in a 71-year-old female patient enrolled in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 receiving BRC-471. The event occurred on Day 111, led to permanent discontinuation of study drug, required hospitalization and steroids, and resolved by 05 October 2023. Expedited regulatory submissions to EudraVigilance and national competent authorities were completed within required timelines.
content:
SERIOUS ADVERSE EVENT REPORT


Biorce Therapeutics S.L. · Pharmacovigilance




SAE Reference: 
BIORCE-SAE-2023-008
Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001
Report Type: Final (3rd Report)
EudraVigilance: EV-2023-EU-047821




⚠ EXPEDITED REPORT — SUSAR — 7-DAY SUBMISSION ⚠




Patient Code
BRC471-FR01-003


Age / Sex
71 years / Female


Weight
58 kg


Study drug / Dose
BRC-471 200 mg BID


First dose date
03 May 2023


Days on treatment
111 days


SAE onset date
22 August 2023


Investigator aware
24 August 2023


Sponsor notified
25 Aug 2023 ✓ (within 24h)




1. Event




Field
Value


MedDRA PT
Pneumonitis


MedDRA SOC
Respiratory, Thoracic and Mediastinal Disorders


Maximum CTCAE Grade
Grade 3 — Severe (O₂ supplementation required)


Outcome
✅ Resolved — confirmed by CT scan 05 October 2023




2. Clinical Narrative



A 71-year-old female with EGFR-mutant (exon 19 deletion) Stage IVA NSCLC
enrolled in BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 presented on 22 August 2023 (Day 111) with
5-day history of progressive dyspnoea and dry cough. HRCT showed bilateral
ground-glass opacities, peripheral distribution, lower lobes bilaterally —
consistent with drug-induced pneumonitis. BAL negative for all pathogens.
BRC-471 permanently discontinued 24 August. Prednisolone 1 mg/kg initiated
25 August. Hospitalised 14 days (24 Aug–07 Sep). O₂ discontinued 01 Sep.
Final HRCT 05 October: near-complete resolution.



3. Causality


Probably related to BRC-471.
 Temporal relationship, characteristic bilateral GGO pattern, exclusion of infection, improvement on drug hold + steroids.


4. Regulatory Actions




Action
Date
Status


EudraVigilance SUSAR submission
28 Aug 2023
✅ 7-day report filed


National CA notifications (FR, ES, DE, IT)
29–31 Aug 2023
✅ Filed


Ethics Committee notification
29 Aug 2023
✅ Filed






BIORCE-SAE-2023-008 · Final Report · BIORCE-ONC-2023-001
